name: Taco Pie Quiche
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F.
Brown beef in skillet; drain off fat. Stir in taco seasoning mix and water, cover, and simmer (follow label directions). Cool for 10 minutes. Add cheese and chilies and mix well. Spoon into prebaked pastry shell. Combine eggs, cream, and salt; mix until smooth. Pour over meat mixture. Bake in preheated oven for 40 to 45 minutes, or until custard is set and pastry is browned. Allow pie to stand 5 minutes before serving.
